creator: EUVS Digital Collection
description: An unofficial mirror of all the downloadable vintage cocktail books in the Exposition Universelle des Vins et Spiritueux (EUVS) Digital Collection (euvslibrary.com) which were uploaded up to April 20, 2020. Works were originally collected and catalogued by Anistatia Miller. --- Titles in this collection include: 1000 Misture by Elvezio Grassi (1936) 1705 Le parfait limonadier 1804-Art-du-limonadier
